title: BEM-856 execute 855
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:52 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
route=load('governance/state/bem855_route_after_bem854.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
resp=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md')
txt=read(resp)
if rs=='process_response_next' and resp.exists():
    protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM856_CLAUDE_RESPONSE_PROTOCOL_RESULT.md')
    decision='UNKNOWN'
    up=txt.upper()
    if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in up: decision='APPROVED'
    elif 'DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
    protocol.write_text('# BEM-856 | Claude Response Protocol Result'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Source: `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md`'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+sep+'## Response preview'+sep+sep+txt[:4000]+sep)
    status='protocol_result_created_from_bem844_response'
    next_action='if decision APPROVED finalize protocol; if BLOCKED/CHANGE_REQUIRED repair stated blocker'
elif rs=='runtime_seen_response_missing_next':
    status='inspect_writer_commit_path_required'
    next_action='patch dispatcher commit script to include bem844_claude_response.md and verify ensure step'
elif rs=='dispatch_result_probe_queued':
    status='dispatch_probe_created_wait_tick'
    next_action='tick and verify dispatch results'
elif rs=='runtime_probe_queued':
    status='runtime_probe_created_wait_tick'
    next_action='tick and verify runtime state'
else:
    status='route_execution_unknown'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-855 route status and BEM-844 response existence'
state={'bem':'BEM-856','status':status,'route_status':rs,'response_exists':resp.exists(),'response_preview':txt[:1200],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem856_execute_bem855_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem856_execute_bem855_route.md').write_text('# BEM-856 | Execute BEM-855 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem856_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-856'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem856_execute_bem855_route.json','governance/reports/bem856_execute_bem855_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem856_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='protocol_result_created_from_bem844_response': changed.append('governance/protocols/BEM856_CLAUDE_RESPONSE_PROTOCOL_RESULT.md')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-855 route by processing BEM-844 response if present or selecting writer/dispatch/runtime repair')
"""
No issue comments.
